calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-052 / MECH-303 contextual passive safety terrain substrate readiness (4-arm diagnostic)
items.notes: 4-arm substrate readiness diagnostic for SD-052 (contextual passive safety terrain). ARM_0=OFF baseline (bit-identical), ARM_1=write-only (release_threshold=999, terrain accumulates but gate cannot fire), ARM_2=full MECH-303 (release_threshold=1.0, gate fires when evaluate_safety>=threshold), ARM_3=gate-only (accum_weight=0, terrain empty). 10 acceptance criteria C1-C10. Dry-run PASS 10/10 (2026-05-04). PASS unlocks context-conditioned-vs-cue-conditioned safety extinction discriminative-pair experiment (MECH-303 vs MECH-304 ablation comparison).
